narrative.goal: Apply iterative UI/UX polish to the XeF2 artifact via Agentation MCP feedback
narrative.next: Listen to the Agentation MCP for incoming annotations on the XeF2 artifact and address them iteratively

ClF3: both LPs on bondless left at (28,32)+(32,32) and (28,48)+(32,48). - 180Â° annotation: dynamic text `${outer}â€“${central}â€“${outer} = ${angle}Â°` perpendicular to bond axis with subtle marker at central atom. - 5-domain row scrubber: `step={1}` integer-only, hidden during predict-1 and predict-2, label format `5-domain row Â· AXE Â· shape`. - Right pane restructured to flex-column â€” stepper sits below content, no gradient overlap. - `chipUpdatesForFocus` rewritten to flip both ON and OFF; advance/retreat/recordPrediction all clear `activePanel` to keep view in sync with bubble copy. - New Prediction1 keys: `counting`, `blocking`, `idk` with bespoke reveal copy from the brief. - `RepresentationPanelId` no longer includes `wedge`; treatment, SVG, helpers, debug-page list all cleaned up. - Dev server running on port 4001 (Next 16.1.6); tab proxied via `http://claude.localhost:1355`.
